task_completion.description: Configure 'Russian (ru)' as the preferred language in Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser settings/preferences page showing 'Russian' or 'ru' added and moved to the top of the language preferences.
Tor Browser 'about:config' page or a text editor modifying 'prefs.js' showing 'privacy.spoof_english' being changed to disable it (e.g., set to false, 0, or deleted).

task_completion.description: Navigate to https://httpbin.org/headers to capture the headers with Russian language configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser displaying the JSON response from https://httpbin.org/headers. The 'Accept-Language' field in the JSON should reflect 'ru'.

task_completion.description: Export the Russian headers JSON response to /home/ga/Documents/headers_ru.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog, terminal command, or text editor showing the JSON response being saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/headers_ru.json'.
Tor Browser 'about:config' page or a text editor modifying 'prefs.js' showing 'privacy.spoof_english' being restored to its secure default (e.g., set to true, 2, or reset).

task_completion.description: Navigate to https://httpbin.org/headers again to capture the headers with the protection re-enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser displaying the JSON response from https://httpbin.org/headers. The 'Accept-Language' field in the JSON should reflect English ('en-US' or 'en').

task_completion.description: Export the updated English headers JSON response to /home/ga/Documents/headers_en.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog, terminal command, or text editor showing the updated JSON response being saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/headers_en.json'.

integrity.description: The agent must use Tor Browser to navigate to the target URL and capture the headers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Tor Browser UI displaying the https://httpbin.org/headers page. The agent should not bypass the browser entirely by using 'curl' or Python scripts, as the task requires testing the browser's anti-fingerprinting protections.

integrity.description: The agent must export the actual JSON response received from the website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for copy-pasting from the browser or saving the page directly. The agent should not manually type out a fabricated JSON response in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent must genuinely interact with Tor Browser's configuration to change the spoofing preference.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with 'about:config' or direct edits to 'prefs.js'. The agent should not just create the output files without actually changing the browser settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://httpbin.org/headers. Target preference: 'privacy.spoof_english'. Expected output files: /home/ga/Documents/headers_ru.json and /home/ga/Documents/headers_en.json. Note: 'privacy.spoof_english' is natively an integer preference (0, 1, 2) in Tor Browser. The agent may modify it via about:config (potentially deleting and recreating it as a boolean) or by editing prefs.js directly.
